overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt traversing a snowy mountain ridge at dusk. The character walks along a narrow cliff path overlooking a misty forested valley, ascends to an open ridge with panoramic mountain views under a purple sky, then turns and descends back along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow snowy cliff path overlooking forested valley

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow snowy cliff path with swords on his back, moving away from the camera

entered.detail: narrow snow-covered trail along the cliff edge with footprints visible
dense evergreen forest covering the valley floor below the cliff
atmospheric fog rising from the valley between the trees
dark rock face forming the wall beside the path
snow-covered mountain range visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a narrow snowy mountain path carved into a cliffside. To the left, a misty valley filled with pine forests drops away, while a rocky cliff wall rises on the right. The atmosphere is cold and serene with diffused dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with panoramic peak views

events.description: ascends from enclosed cliff path to open mountain ridge with expansive views
purple and pink dusk sky becomes fully visible above the mountain peaks

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues along the ridge line with mountain summits surrounding him on all sides

entered.detail: jagged snow-covered summits dominating the horizon under the purple sky
vivid purple and pink twilight sky with scattered clouds
snow-dusted boulders along the ridge edge

segments.scene_description: As Geralt ascends to the ridge crest, the scene opens into a wide panoramic vista. The sky transitions to dramatic purple dusk tones while snow-capped mountain peaks dominate the background. The enclosed valley fog fades from view as the character traverses the exposed ridge line.

scene_state.functional_zone: returning along snowy cliff path with valley view

events.description: Geralt turns around 180 degrees to face the camera before walking back

agents.ego_description: Geralt pivots on the path to face the camera, then proceeds walking back in the opposite direction

entered.detail: fog rising from the valley now visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns around on the ridge, shifting the perspective so the valley now appears on the right. The dramatic purple sky and distant peaks exit the frame as the character descends back toward the enclosed cliff path, with the misty valley fog re-entering the scene from the new angle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy mountain ridge that transitions from an enclosed cliffside path to an expansive panoramic vista and back again. It begins with Geralt walking along a narrow trail carved into a cliff, flanked by a rocky wall and a misty valley of pine forests under diffused dusk lighting. As he ascends to the ridge crest, the scene opens into a wide vista where the enclosed fog fades and the sky shifts to dramatic purple tones against a backdrop of snow-capped peaks. The perspective then shifts as Geralt turns around on the exposed ridge, causing the distant mountains to exit the frame. Finally, the camera descends back toward the cliff path, with the misty valley fog re-entering the scene from the opposite side.
